title: Diana's Digital Twin
shortDescription: A multi-interface AI Digital Twin built with FastAPI and OpenAI GPT, accessible via Telegram or a Web Chat Widget.
detailedDescription: Acts as a Digital Twin answering questions about professional background, skills, and projects based on Diana's resume and notes. Built with a modular architecture supporting easy integration of new interfaces. Features include seamless cross-platform pairing between web and Telegram, Redis-backed persistent memory, and a glassmorphic chat widget. Deployed on Railway.app.

title: CV/JD Comparison Tool
shortDescription: A sophisticated web application designed to help job seekers optimize their resumes (CVs) and prepare for interviews using advanced AI.
detailedDescription: Analyzes the user's uploaded CV against a specific job description, providing a detailed match score, tailored CV improvements, and customized interview questions. Features include dual authentication via Email/Google OAuth, a flexible pay-per-use credit system, and automated background jobs to anonymize PII (Personally Identifiable Information) from stored data.

title: Event AI Scheduler
shortDescription: An intelligent, personalized AI companion for conference attendees to navigate their event schedule and generate customized itineraries.
detailedDescription: Leverages the Vercel AI SDK and OpenAI to provide a conversational AI interface. Uses dynamic background tool execution to retrieve JSON event data (sessions, exhibitors) and seamlessly integrate it into the context. Includes an interactive schedule generator that produces a printable, conflict-free daily itinerary based on the user's thematic interests and attendance days.

title: GEO Audit
shortDescription: A React web application to evaluate a webpage's likelihood of being cited by Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) AI search engines.
detailedDescription: Analyzes a target URL based on 2026 AI Search standards (e.g., Perplexity, SearchGPT). Evaluates Fact Density, Entity Salience, and Extractability. Built with a secure two-service architecture: a static React/Vite frontend served by Nginx, and a lightweight Express backend proxy that securely holds LLM API keys and processes audits.
